title: Load Event
description: A climbing session (with individually logged climbs), a rest-day workout, or a minimal rest/nothing day.

id.description: Unique id, matches the filename stem: <date>--<shortid>.

discipline.description: Where the climbing happened (climbing_session only). One session = one discipline; log two sessions for a gym + board day.

gym_id.description: id of the gym in gyms/ (required when discipline=gym).

location.description: Optional free-text place, e.g. outdoor crag/area.

source.description: Provenance. Absent = logged live in climblog. 'kaya' = backfilled from the Kaya app; attempts may follow the documented estimation convention and duration_min is user-estimated from video timestamps.

climbs.description: One entry per climb (or per problem worked). Session aggregates like volume and hardest send are derived, never stored.

name.description: Climb name. Boards + outdoor always; optional label on gym climbs to link a multi-session project across entries (e.g. 'pink cave dyno').

grade.description: Raw grade in the venue's system: V5, 3kyu/1dan, or a circuit level name defined by the gym.

styles.description: Gym climbs only; a climb can be several.

board_angle.description: Board climbs only: angle in degrees.

attempts_estimated.description: true when attempts is a convention estimate (backfill: send=5, fail=10, project send=20, project fail=30) rather than a counted number. Exclude/discount in dose-response analyses.

repeat.description: true = sent this problem on a previous day (first send = sent && !repeat). Asked even when not sent — a failed attempt on a previously-sent problem is a regression signal.

workout_type.description: For rest_workout days: what the non-climbing training was.
